description: bind:value two-way sync (§5.4). Typing into the text input fires `input`, syncing @username; the #greeting interpolation re-renders. The runtime input value is a DOM property, not a serialized attribute, so the whole-tree dom shows no value= (assert via state + the interpolated display).
rationale: §5.4 bind:value: a text input syncs its cell on the `input` event. The input verb sets value + fires input through the same handler both impls wire.
